title: Create More Potatoes
body:
![Item tabs.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/CkAtymPy/images/eeeff5a215d63d0153effd13515fa2793ba00aed.png) For Minecraft Forge 1.18.2 Thanks to SomeDom(artist) and Forsteri(coder) Community Discord for Create More Potatoes:
https://discord.gg/fGUhb7Mwv2 **About:** Create: More Potatoes extends Create's potato cannon and tools associated with it. We have yummy but harmful potato products, like Explosive Potato, and Flame Potato. All the recipes are available through JEI. **Content:** - Explosive potato: Potato that explode when land - Flame potato: Potato that set fire on you when hit - Frosty potato: Potato that freezes you when hit - Stationary Potato Cannon: Potato Cannon but block - Potato Turret: Stationary Potato Cannon but faces the nearest entity And **A LOT** other cool feature you definitely want to try out! **Quick youtube showcase(not all feature)**
